message:
test(core): property-based tests for bloom filter invariants (wa-9nyo)

15 proptest properties validating: no false negatives, FP rate bounded,
counting insert/remove roundtrip, union correctness, clear resets,
optimal sizing, memory scaling, count tracking, estimated FP monotonicity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
